Indicators of Popularity and Fame
The desire to be popular Is Innate In every Individual, It Is a natural
and psychologi<al motivation which inspires people to achieve great
deeds. Even those who are accused for criminal acts have been found
to be clamouring for popularity. The area of activity in which an individual
wishes to achieve popularity and fame may differ from one person to
another but the desire for appreciation. fame and popularity is almost
universal. But it is found that every body is not so luc$<y as to get
appre<iation from others. Some persons are really very capable in several
